body:
## JIRA [BCIN-6709](https://strategyagile.atlassian.net/browse/BCIN-6709)
# Description
Design doc: https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/~yuanli/pages/5728862732/Report+error+-+revert+instance
Server PR: https://github.com/mstr-kiai/server/pull/10905

## Root Cause
New feature

## Fix/Solution Discussion
PUT or POST "/{id}/instances/{instanceId}/manipulations"

```json
{
  "actions": [
    {
      "act": "undo",
      "stid": -1,                // recreate instance
      "reCreateInstance": true,  // no data, <rfrs <os>8</os>
      "resolveExecution": true  // no prompt <rfrs exef | DssXmlDocExecutionResolve
    }
  ],
  "style": { "params": { "treesToRender": 1 }, "name": "RWIVEMojoStyle" },
  "excludeData": false,
  "noActionMode": true, // pause mode
  "resolveOnly": true,  // pause mode
  "sqlViewMode": false,
  "suppressData": false
```

```xml
<st>
    <sst>
        <st>
            <cmd>
                <rfrs sid="184DD2DBE2E1ED48BDCEEBC6F5460CB8" pgd_login="B3FEE61A11E696C8BD0F0080EFC58F44" mid="7F4E722DA0469C7592C1F2B59E7C2E45" exef="163844" resf="-2147483616" stid="-1">
                    <extendable_parameter>
                        <os>8</os>
                    </extendable_parameter>
                </rfrs>
            </cmd>
        </st>
    </sst>
</st>
```


### Risk introduced by the fix:
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

### Self Test ⚠
- [ ] I have run Acceptance Test for my changes. Reference: [Pre-merge Checklist](https://microstrategy.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TTAWC/pages/3099232802/Pre-Merge+Checklist)
- [ ] I have run Automation Test for my changes (TCxxx, TCxxx)

## Test Suggestion:
Please list the affected scenarios and components here, and give test suggestions to SETs.

⚠ You should also list your self test cases(if any) here since SET also need them.

# If this is a HotFix/Patch Branch PR 
<!--
The following is the comment template to include the key information about the change and its inclusion to the build.
-->
The PR is to merge code change of DE-XYZ (tracked by PR #98765) from source_branch to 11.3.x Update branch.
- [ ] **Project to compile**
BIWeb
- [ ] **Files to deliver**

commits.messageHeadline: BCEN-4843; support new <os>8 flag for reCreateReportInstance
